admission_process.answer: The admission process includes filling the application form, submitting required documents, and attending counseling. Admission is merit-based and seats are allotted depending on availability.

required_documents.answer: Required documents include 10th and 12th mark sheets, Transfer Certificate, Migration Certificate, Aadhaar Card, passport-size photos, and caste certificate if applicable.

last_date.answer: The last date to apply for admission is generally till the end of July or until all seats are filled.

entrance_exam.answer: No separate entrance exam is required. Admission is completely based on merit (12th PCM percentage).

seats_per_branch.answer: The  branch has an intake capacity of 500 seats.

seats_available.answer: Seat availability changes daily. Please contact the admission office for updated information.

reservation_policy.answer: Reservation is provided as per government norms for SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories.

fees_per_year.answer: The yearly fee for B.Tech ₹1,11,000 and M.Tech fee is ₹1,21,000.

hostel_charges.answer: The hostel fee is ₹45,000 per year, including mess charges. A refundable security deposit of ₹5,000 is applicable.

scholarship.answer: Scholarships are available for merit students, girls, EWS category and through government schemes like Post-Matric and National Scholarship Portal (NSP).

college_location.answer: PIIT is located in Uttar Pradesh.

principal.answer: The principal of the college is Dr. Princess Pandey, holding M.Tech and PhD in Computer Science.

college_timings.answer: The college timings are from 9:30 AM to 4:30 PM, Monday to Saturday.

campus_facilities.answer: Campus facilities include smart classrooms, computer labs, library and digital library, WiFi-enabled campus, canteen, sports ground, seminar hall, medical room, CCTV surveillance and parking.

established.answer: The college was established in the year 2010.

affiliated.answer: PIIT is affiliated to Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU).

aicte.answer: Yes, the college is approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi.

keywords: is there dress code apply in institution
uniform.answer: Yes, PIIT follows a formal uniform. Boys: Light blue shirt with navy trousers. Girls: Light blue kurti with navy leggings. Free dress is allowed on designated days.

hostel_boys_girls.answer: Yes, separate hostels for boys and girls are available inside the campus.

keywords: Is there wifi available for students in hostel
wifi.answer: The campus and hostels have 24x7 WiFi access for students.

keywords: What is the timing of mess
mess_timings.answer: Mess Timings: Breakfast 8:00 AM, Lunch 1:00 PM, Dinner 8:00 PM.

rooms_available.answer: There are 500 rooms in the hostel. Rooms allotment is based on vacancy and is done on a first-come, first-served basis.

hostel_timings.answer: Hostel timings are 6:00 AM to 9:00 PM for entry and exit.

courses_offered.answer: The college offers B.Tech (Bachelor of Technology) and M.Tech(Masters of Technology).

keywords: What is the duration of course
course_duration.answer: The course duration is 4 years (8 semesters).

branches.answer: Institution offers CSE(Computer Science and Engineering),ECE(Electronics and Communication Engineering).

branch_intake.answer: Each branch has an intake of 500 students.

placement_support.answer: Yes, the Training & Placement Cell provides aptitude classes, interview preparation, internships, and campus recruitment support.

hiring_companies.answer: Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and various IT startups.

keywords: whom to contact for admission queries
admission_contact.answer: For admission queries, contact +91 976543210 or email: admission@piit.edu.

keywords: whom to contact for hostel quesries
hostel_contact.answer: For hostel-related queries, contact +91 912345780 or email: hostel@piit.edu.

mtech_fees.answer: The M.Tech fee is ₹1,21,000 per year. Scholarships and assistantships may be available based on merit and government schemes; please contact the admission office for exact waivers and instalment options.

greeting_hello.answer: Hello! 👋 I am PIIT's virtual assistant — how can I help you today? You can ask about admissions, fees, hostels, courses or placements.

greeting_bye.answer: Goodbye! 😊 If you need anything else, just type your question — all the best and have a great day!
